titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 604

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=926 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 16:47:55.658313+00 | translation moa=927 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 16:47:55.66599+00

p.cl: . W . dei gratia Rex Scott’ . Iusticiis Uicecomitibus . Ministris et Omnibus probis Hominibus totius terre sue . Salutem .

Mando et firmiter precipio . Ne quis uestrum aliquem de hominibus prioris de Coldingham contra ipsum priorem siue
contra domum suam iniuste manuteneat  quin quod de ratione facere debeat ei faciat .

Testibus Com’. Dauid
fratre meo . Hug’. Cancellario meo . Comite . Dunecano .
William, by the grace of God king of the Scots, to justices, sheriffs, officials, and all worthy men of his entire land, greeting.

I command and resolutely instruct that none of you unlawfully maintain any of the tenants of the prior of Coldingham in opposition to the prior himself or in opposition to his house; but that he do to him that which by reason he ought to do.
As witnesses: Earl David, my brother; Hugh, my chancellor; Earl David.
